name: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP
business: The Partnership was formed in 1998 for the purpose of acquiring a portfolio of MRBs that are issued by state and local housing authorities to provide construction and/or permanent financing for affordable multifamily, seniors housing and commercial properties. We also invest in GILs, which, similar to MRBs, provide financing for affordable multifamily and seniors housing properties. We also make JV Equity Investments for the construction, stabilization, and ultimate sale of market-rate multifamily and seniors housing properties.

exposures.sentence: The Partnership was formed in 1998 for the purpose of acquiring a portfolio of MRBs that are issued by state and local housing authorities to provide construction and/or permanent financing for affordable multifamily, seniors housing and commercial properties.
We also invest in GILs, which, similar to MRBs, provide financing for affordable multifamily and seniors housing properties.

The Partnership has established incident response procedures to be followed in the event of a cybersecurity incident that is overseen by the Partnership s Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer.

Part of the construction financing is provided through a C-PACE program, which is a state policy-enabled financing mechanism that allows developers to access the capital needed to make renewable energy accessible and cost-effective.
